body:
Occupational Therapy Practice Guidelines: Hand and Upper Extremity

Public AOTA practice-guideline overview shared by the CHT review course. Covers assessment and intervention for hand and upper extremity conditions.
title: Hand and Upper Extremity Practice Guidelines

body:
Flexor Tendon Rehabilitation Protocols

Reference summary of early active motion and immobilization protocols for flexor tendon repair, shared for CHT exam study.
title: Flexor Tendon Rehabilitation Protocols

body:
Carpal Tunnel Syndrome: Conservative Management

Evidence summary on splinting, nerve-gliding, and activity modification for carpal tunnel syndrome.
title: Carpal Tunnel Syndrome Conservative Management

body:
Edema Management for the Hand Therapist

Overview of manual edema mobilization, compression, and elevation techniques for the post-surgical hand.
title: Edema Management for the Hand

body:
Goniometry and ROM Measurement Study Notes

CHT review course study notes on goniometric measurement of upper extremity range of motion.
title: Goniometry and ROM Measurement

body:
Orthotic Fabrication for Common Hand Conditions

Study reference on thermoplastic orthosis fabrication for mallet finger, trigger finger, and de Quervain's.
title: Orthotic Fabrication for Hand Conditions

body:
CHT Certification Exam Content Outline

Course-shared summary of the Hand Therapy Certification Examination content domains and study weighting.
title: CHT Exam Content Outline

body:
Peripheral Nerve Injury and Sensory Re-education

Evidence summary on nerve injury classification and sensory re-education protocols for hand therapy.
title: Peripheral Nerve Injury and Sensory Re-education
